violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Eggs are from a farm. Not approved for retail.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Shelled eggs were stored on a shelf above ready-to-eat foods in the prep cooler.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Cutting Board was dirty underneath.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Box on sausage on floor in cooler

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil *was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoop in flour not stored handle up or outside container
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. observed microwave needing cleaned
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. single-use cups observed on floor

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. observed ceilings were textured not smooth
